title: TRANSSYSTEM Group
description: transsystem.pl Polish engineering powerhouse with 30+ years of expertise in designing and manufacturing advanced technological transport systems and steel structures. Delivers turnkey intralogistics solutions for automotive, tire, and industrial sectors, with 200+ successful projects across 30+ countries worldwide. Trusted by global leaders including Tesla, Goodyear, Michelin, Continental, and KUKA for innovation, precision, and operational excellence
